creator: simonthoby@gmail.com
text:
ok, I finally tried it on real hardware and It work with tha -CURRENT, thanks and sorry for making you losing your time.
i've asked on the IRC channel before submitting the bug report, maybe someone might knows that I should use CURRENT but a single guy monopolised the chan and insist, saying that a should fill a PR. It's sad that developers lose their time because of issues that should be resolved by asking on the appropriate chan.
Thanks again for your help !
